overall.description: A cinematic drive along a desert highway toward a futuristic city skyline in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera passes a large neon sign and other vehicles while power lines and transmission towers line the road through arid terrain.

events.description: passing the large Night City neon sign on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the desert highway toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving ahead in the same direction on the highway

entered.detail: large red neon sign with palm tree design marking the city entrance
overhead electrical cables stretching across the highway
tall metal structures with crossbars holding power lines
futuristic skyscrapers and buildings visible on the horizon
large rock formations and boulders along the roadside
metal barrier running along the left edge of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sun-baked desert highway toward a distant futuristic city. The camera approaches and passes a prominent red neon sign on the left while power lines and transmission towers line the right side of the road. Sparse desert vegetation and rock formations dot the arid landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with power infrastructure

events.description: dark colored SUV passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway with the city skyline growing larger ahead

notable_agents.action: dark SUV overtaking and passing on the left side

entered.detail: large empty billboard structure appearing along the left roadside

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the desert highway with the Night City sign now behind. The road stretches toward the distant skyline with power lines running parallel. A billboard appears on the left and an SUV passes by, while the transmission towers grow larger on the right side.

events.description: camera begins a slight right turn following the road curve

agents.ego_description: following the highway curve to the right while maintaining speed toward the city

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the right, shifting the perspective so the city skyline moves to the left side of the frame. The transmission towers and power lines become more prominent on the right as the camera follows the road curve through the desert landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a sun-baked desert highway that gradually curves to shift the perspective of a distant futuristic skyline. It begins by approaching and passing a prominent red neon sign on the left, with power lines and transmission towers framing the right side of the arid, rocky landscape. As the sign recedes into the distance, the camera continues forward past a roadside billboard and a passing SUV while the transmission towers grow larger and more imposing. The scene then shifts as the highway curves gently to the right, causing the city skyline to migrate toward the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera follows this bend through the desert, leaving the straight stretch behind as the power lines and towers become the dominant visual anchor on the right.
